meta.name: McSur Plasma
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: A macOS-style KDE Plasma desktop built on the McSur global theme (dark). The whole look — window decorations, widgets, colours, icons and cursors — comes from one look-and-feel package, applied declaratively via `theme.global`; a post-install hook fetches McSur system-wide. No forced UI scaling: Plasma handles HiDPI itself.

settings.label: Wallpaper
settings.description: A local image path or a URL.

files.content:
[Appearance]
Font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font,12,-1,5,50,0,0,0,0,0

[General]
Name=McSur
Parent=FALLBACK/
TerminalColumns=110
TerminalRows=30

[Scrolling]
HistoryMode=2

[Terminal Features]
BlinkingCursorEnabled=true

# McSur Plasma — Manifest OS
export EDITOR=nano
export HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history
export HISTSIZE=10000
export SAVEHIST=10000
setopt HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS SHARE_HISTORY

alias ls='eza --icons --group-directories-first'
alias ll='eza -lah --icons --group-directories-first'
alias cat='bat --paging=never'
alias grep='grep --color=auto'
alias update='sudo pacman -Syu'

[ -f /usr/share/fzf/key-bindings.zsh ] && source /usr/share/fzf/key-bindings.zsh
[ -f /usr/share/fzf/completion.zsh ] && source /usr/share/fzf/completion.zsh

autoload -Uz compinit && compinit
eval "$(starship init zsh)"
command -v fastfetch >/dev/null && fastfetch

# McSur — Manifest OS
add_newline = true
format = """
[](surface0)$os$username[](bg:surface1 fg:surface0)$directory[](fg:surface1 bg:none) $git_branch$git_status
$character"""

palette = 'mcsur'

[palettes.mcsur]
surface0 = '#2b2b2b'
surface1 = '#3a3a3a'
blue = '{{accent}}'
green = '#31c48d'
text = '#e6e6e6'

[os]
disabled = false
style = 'bg:surface0 fg:blue'
[os.symbols]
Arch = ' '

[username]
show_always = true
style_user = 'bg:surface0 fg:text'
style_root = 'bg:surface0 fg:red'
format = '[ $user ]($style)'

[directory]
style = 'bg:surface1 fg:text'
format = '[ $path ]($style)'
truncation_length = 3

[git_branch]
symbol = ' '
style = 'fg:blue'
format = '[$symbol$branch]($style) '

[git_status]
style = 'fg:blue'

[character]
success_symbol = '[❯](bold green)'
error_symbol = '[❯](bold red)'

{
  "$schema": "https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch/raw/dev/doc/json_schema.json",
  "logo": { "type": "file", "source": "/usr/share/manifest-os/logo.txt", "padding": { "top": 1, "right": 3 } },
  "display": { "separator": "  " },
  "modules": [
    { "type": "title", "color": { "user": "blue", "host": "cyan" } },
    "separator",
    { "type": "os", "key": " OS", "keyColor": "blue" },
    { "type": "kernel", "key": " Kernel", "keyColor": "cyan" },
    { "type": "de", "key": " DE", "keyColor": "cyan" },
    { "type": "wm", "key": " WM", "keyColor": "cyan" },
    { "type": "terminal", "key": " Term", "keyColor": "green" },
    { "type": "cpu", "key": " CPU", "keyColor": "yellow" },
    { "type": "memory", "key": " RAM", "keyColor": "red" },
    "break",
    { "type": "colors", "paddingLeft": 2, "symbol": "circle" }
  ]
}
